text: Here, I feel the vital tension between movement and pause: the hurried steps of others, my own lingering curiosity. Entering the glass-walled room of innovation, I sense anticipation—a mingling of creative energy and intellectual pursuit. The R+D space exudes possibility. Reading the words about uncertainty and optimism, I resonate with that mood; I am alert, eager, yet contemplative, soaking in the strangeness of new ideas and the comfort of shared exploration.
